extracted_from: field_classification.md Category A (15 system-level engine state fields)
purpose: Engine-level state not specific to LCA/LCC/SLCA pillars. Initialized by the engine during case lifecycle (case creation, charter signing, panel composition, reporting layer assembly). Referenced by L2/L3 cross-method rules but NOT set by individual Phase 1 nodes.

fields.set_by: case lifecycle (populated when LCC HC-02 triggers facilitator selection)
fields.notes: Required when Q3 has >=2 dims AND Q1 in {A,B,C,E}; populated as identifier of the neutral 3rd-party facilitator coordinating multi-actor IS data collection.

fields.set_by: case lifecycle (LCC HC-03 enforces signing before confidential data exchange)
fields.notes: Must be true before any confidential data exchange in multi-actor multi-dim assessments.

fields.set_by: charter signing process (LCA HC-16, LCA HC-20, LCC HC-31)
fields.notes: True when Functional Equivalent has been formally documented in the methodological charter signed by all parties.

fields.set_by: charter signing process (lca_hc_16, lcc_hc_31 are co-asserters)
fields.notes: True when the methodological charter is signed before any modeling begins. Cross-method gate: LCA mandates it (lca_hc_16) and LCC mandates it (lcc_hc_31); both nodes set this same field. Added per Mirko approval in field_gaps round 2 (DESIGN CALL 2).
Must NOT equal 'single_score' when Q3 has >=2 active dimensions. L3 enforcement.

fields.set_by: reporting layer (truncations declared during inventory completeness checks)
fields.notes: List of declared boundary truncations per active dimension. Mandatory transparency artifact.

fields.set_by: engine (derived from Q3 multi-checkbox: subset of {LCA, LCC, SLCA})
fields.notes: Each dimension entry retains its own units (no cross-dim normalization). Items have shape {pillar, units, methodology}.
Always 'comparative_outcomes' for IS context (per IR-19, S-LCA HC-47). Absolute framing forbidden.

fields.set_by: engine (3-layer reporting architecture per IR-11, LCA MC-35, LCC HC-29, S-LCA HC-44)
fields.notes: Must be isomorphic across all active dimensions when Q4 in {C,D} AND Q3 has >=2 dims.

fields.set_by: engine (L3 enforcement when Q4 includes B/C/D)
fields.notes: Must remain null for any external use (Q4 in {B,C,D}). Internal dashboards may aggregate.

fields.set_by: review panel composition (mandatory >=3 if Q4=C per IR-18, LCA HC-08)
fields.notes: Number of independent expert reviewers. Must be >=3 when Q4=C (public superiority claim).
True iff all panel members are independent of project parties. Mandatory true when Q4=C.
Must be 'all_dimensions' when Q4=C and Q3 has >=2 active dimensions.

fields.set_by: engine pipeline state machine (transitions screening -> detailed)
fields.notes: Allowed values: 'screening' | 'detailed'. Phase 1 is screening; detailed phase requires screening completion first.

fields.set_by: engine (per IR-08, LCA MC-33, LCC HC-38 when Q3.ENV+Q3.ECO active)
fields.notes: Must be 'MFA' (Material Flow Analysis / MFCA bridge) when both LCA and LCC are active.

fields.set_by: per-dim engine output (each dim retains own units)
fields.notes: Sub-field of report.dimensions array. Examples: LCA -> {kg CO2-eq, MJ, ...}; LCC -> {EUR_NPV, EUR_LCOE, ...}; SLCA -> {score_-2_to_+2, ...}. NO cross-dim unit normalization allowed.
